Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform.  
MODEL DEPLOYMENT STARTS WITH MODEL EXPORTING.  
AWS EC2 INSTANCES PROVIDE COMPUTING POWER.  
MODEL VERSIONING IS CRITICAL FOR TRACKING.  
SECURITY MEASURES MUST BE IMPLEMENTED.  
DEPLOYMENT INTEGRATION WITH API GATEWAYS IS NECESSARY.  
MODEL PERFORMANCE NEEDS MONITORING.  
OVERFITTING CAN AFFECT ACCURACY.  
DATA ENCRYPTION IS ESSENTIAL FOR SECURITY.  
MODEL INFERENCE SHOULD BE OPTIMIZED.  
SECURE COMMUNICATION IS REQUIRED.  
DEPLOYMENT COSTS MUST BE MANAGED.  
MODEL SCALABILITY NEEDS PLANNING.  
SECURITY POLICIES SHOULD BE ENFORCED.  
DATA ACCESS CONTROLS ARE IMPORTANT.  
MODEL MAINTENANCE IS ONGOING.  
SECURITY AUDITS SHOULD BE PERFORMED.  
DEPLOYMENT SUCCESS DEPENDS ON TESTING.  
SECURE STORAGE IS NECESSARY.  
MODEL PERFORMANCE IS KEY.  
SECURITY THREATS MUST BE AVOIDED.  

* * *

DEPLOYMENT REQUIRES PYTHON LIBRARIES.
